'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/rss.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=sJpHpqevahce4lp8qyIMSAvPIq1.XsyOAmXaORQnOT4-1774504463-1.0.1.1-NJx4H49DIi4pztl179w_0hULfOOL79GbVx25PqJlo2U"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
